description: Restructure the Phase I Environmental Site Assessment (ESA) report located at '/home/ga/Documents/esa_draft.docx' and save the result as '/home/ga/Documents/esa_formatted.docx'. The document must be organized into four distinct sections: 'Cover Page', 'Body' (starting at Executive Summary), 'Site Maps/Data' (starting at Site Maps and Data Tables), and 'Appendices'. Set the 'Site Maps/Data' section to Landscape orientation while maintaining Portrait for others. Configure the headers so the Cover Page has no header, while the remaining sections include 'ESA-2024-0472' and 'Former Kerrigan Manufacturing Facility'. Include page numbers in the footers of all sections except the Cover Page. Apply 'Heading 1' style to all main section titles and 'Heading 2' to all subsections.
